```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(colorRamp2)
#library(ReactomePA) # can't install this
library(clusterProfiler)
library(DOSE)
library(readr)
source(here("scripts/00_get_crossSigs_enrichedGO.R"))
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
marray_path_up <- here("data/v2/microarray_pathways/up")
rnaseq_path_up <- here("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/up")
```

```{r}
pattern <- "GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
prefix_sub <- "GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
suffix_sub <- "up.tsv"
annotation_file = here('data/metadata/direct-annotations__Homo_sapiens__Entrez.tsv')
```

```{r read in summary table}
summary_df <- read.delim(here("data/metadata/202506_all_TB_signatures_info.tsv"), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
summary_df
```

### Upregulated genes' pathways
```{r microarray up pathway clusters}
marray_GO_mat_up = get_GO_testStat_matrix(marray_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
colnames(marray_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_limma", "", colnames(marray_GO_mat_up))
cols_to_keep_marray <- intersect(colnames(marray_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_microarray_DE.tsv"))
marray_GO_mat_up <- marray_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_marray]
colnames(marray_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_DE.tsv", "", colnames(marray_GO_mat_up))
```

```{r RNAseq up pathway clusters}
rnaseq_GO_mat_up = get_GO_testStat_matrix(rnaseq_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_DESeq2", "", colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up))
cols_to_keep_rnaseq <- intersect(colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_RNAseq_DE.tsv"))
rnaseq_GO_mat_up <- rnaseq_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_rnaseq]
colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up) <- gsub("_DE.tsv", "", colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up))
```
```{r combine microarray and RNAseq}
df1 <- marray_GO_mat_up
df2 <- rnaseq_GO_mat_up

# Reshape from wide to long
library(tidyr)
long1 <- pivot_longer(df1, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")
long2 <- pivot_longer(df2, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")

# Combine long formats and sum values where matching
library(dplyr)
combined_long <- bind_rows(long1, long2) %>%
  group_by(Description, Signature) %>%
  summarise(
  Value = if (all(is.na(Value))) NA_real_ else max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop"
)

# Reshape back to wide format
final_df_up <- pivot_wider(combined_long, names_from = Signature, values_from = Value)
colnames(final_df_up) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(final_df_up))

# Identify columns with "aggregated" in their names
agg_cols <- grep("aggregated", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)

# Identify columns that do not contain "aggregated"
non_agg_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_up), agg_cols)

# Reorder the dataframe
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, c(non_agg_cols, agg_cols)]
# Identify columns
desc_col <- grep("Description", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
gpl_cols <- grep("GPL", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
rnaseq_col <- grep("RNAseq", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
other_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_up), c(gpl_cols, rnaseq_col))

# Reorder dataframe
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, c(desc_col, gpl_cols, other_cols, rnaseq_col)]
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, !duplicated(colnames(final_df_up))]
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, !grepl("HIV", colnames(final_df_up))]
```

```{r}
GO_annotation = get_GO_annotation(annotation_file)
```

### MW stats up signatures
```{r circulating vs lung}
rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up <- final_df_up
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(tissue_category)) %>%
            select(SIGNATURE_NAME, tissue_category)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df_$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, tissue_category) %>%
  deframe()

# Initialize results
results <- data.frame(
  GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered),
  p_value = NA_real_,
  statistic = NA_real_
)

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term
for (i in seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered))) {
  values <- go_mat_filtered[i, ]
  
  lung_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "circulating"])])
  circ_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "lung"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(lung_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(circ_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(lung_vals, circ_vals, exact = FALSE)
    results$p_value[i] <- test$p.value
    results$statistic[i] <- test$statistic
  }
}

# adjust p-values using BH correction
results <- results %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

results <- arrange(results, p_adj)
head(results)

significant_go_terms <- results %>%
  filter(p_adj < 0.05) # None
head(significant_go_terms)
```

```{r microarray vs. RNASeq}
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(technology)) %>%
            select(SIGNATURE_NAME, technology)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, technology) %>%
  deframe()

# Initialize results
results <- data.frame(
  GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered),
  p_value = NA_real_,
  statistic = NA_real_
)

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term
for (i in seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered))) {
  values <- go_mat_filtered[i, ]
  
  lung_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "microarray"])])
  circ_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "RNASeq"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(lung_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(circ_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(lung_vals, circ_vals, exact = FALSE)
    results$p_value[i] <- test$p.value
    results$statistic[i] <- test$statistic
  }
}

# adjust p-values using BH correction
results <- results %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

results <- arrange(results, p_adj)
head(results)

significant_go_terms <- results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) # None
head(significant_go_terms)
```
```{r MTB vs. PTB}
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(TB)) %>%
            select(signature, TB)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df_$signature)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(signature %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(signature, TB) %>%
  deframe()

# Initialize results
results <- data.frame(
  GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered),
  p_value = NA_real_,
  statistic = NA_real_
)

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term
for (i in seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered))) {
  values <- go_mat_filtered[i, ]
  
  lung_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "PTB"])])
  circ_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "MTB"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(lung_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(circ_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(lung_vals, circ_vals, exact = FALSE)
    results$p_value[i] <- test$p.value
    results$statistic[i] <- test$statistic
  }
}

# adjust p-values using BH correction
results <- results %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

results <- arrange(results, p_adj)
#head(results)

significant_go_terms <- results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) # None
head(significant_go_terms)
```
```{r cell line vs. primary}
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_up
summary_df_ = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(origin_type)) %>%
            select(signature, origin_type)
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_up")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_up$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df$signature)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]

# build group vector
group_vec <- summary_df_ %>%
  filter(signature %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(signature, origin_type) %>%
  deframe()

# Initialize results
results_cellline_primary <- data.frame(
  GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered),
  p_value = NA_real_,
  statistic = NA_real_
)

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term
for (i in seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered))) {
  values <- go_mat_filtered[i, ]
  
  lung_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "cell line"])])
  circ_vals <- as.numeric(values[, names(group_vec[group_vec == "primary"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(lung_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(circ_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(lung_vals, circ_vals, exact = FALSE)
    results_cellline_primary$p_value[i] <- test$p.value
    results_cellline_primary$statistic[i] <- test$statistic
  }
}

# adjust p-values using BH correction
results_cellline_primary <- results_cellline_primary %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"))

results_cellline_primary <- arrange(results_cellline_primary, p_adj)
#head(results)

significant_go_terms <- results_cellline_primary %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) # None
head(significant_go_terms)

# Convert significant GO terms dataframe to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Cell Line vs. Primary | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table


```

```{r platform microarray | E-MEXP-3521 vs. rest}
# Filter for microarray technology
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "E-MEXP-3521"
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(grepl("E-MEXP-3521", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(!grepl("E-MEXP-3521", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "E-MEXP-3521", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "E-MEXP-3521"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df <- results_df %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "E-MEXP-3521 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(format(p_value, scientific = TRUE), format(p_adj, scientific = TRUE)))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(gt)

# ---- 1. Filter for microarray technology ----
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# ---- 2. Define groups ----
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(grepl("E-MEXP-3521", signature)) %>%
  pull(signature)

group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("E-MEXP-3521", signature)) %>%
  pull(signature)

# ---- 3. Filter the GO matrix ----
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# ---- 4. Build group vector ----
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "E-MEXP-3521", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# ---- 5. Mann-Whitney U test across GO terms ----
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "E-MEXP-3521"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# ---- 6. Convert results to data frame ----
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# ---- 7. Adjust p-values and reorder columns ----
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_value = as.numeric(p_value),
         statistic = as.numeric(statistic),
         p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# ---- 8. Filter for significant GO terms ----
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>%
  filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>%
  mutate(
    p_value = formatC(p_value, format = "e", digits = 2),
    p_adj = formatC(p_adj, format = "e", digits = 2)
  )

# ---- 9. Build gt table ----
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "E-MEXP-3521 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c(p_value, p_adj)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = c(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# ---- 10. Display the table ----
gt_table
```
```{r}
write_tsv(significant_go_terms, file="~/Documents/GitHub/drugrep_tb/figures/diffplatform.tsv")

```

```{r platform microarray | GPL10558 vs. rest}
# Filter for microarray technology
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "GPL10558"
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(grepl("GPL10558", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(!grepl("GPL10558", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "GPL10558", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "GPL10558"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df <- results_df %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GPL10558 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```

```{r platform microarray | GPL570 vs. rest}
# Filter for microarray technology
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "GPL10558"
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(grepl("GPL570", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(!grepl("GPL570", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "GPL570", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "GPL570"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df <- results_df %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GPL570 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```

```{r platform microarray | GPL571 vs. rest}
# Filter for microarray technology
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "GPL10558"
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(grepl("GPL571", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(!grepl("GPL571", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "GPL571", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "GPL571"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df_GPL571 <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df_GPL571 <- results_df_GPL571 %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df_GPL571 %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GPL571 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```


```{r platform microarray | GPL6947 vs. rest}
# Filter for microarray technology
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "GPL6947"
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(grepl("GPL6947", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(!grepl("GPL6947", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "GPL6947", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "GPL6947"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df <- results_df %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GPL6947 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```


```{r platform microarray | GPL10558 vs. rest}
# Filter for microarray technology
microarray_df <- summary_df %>%
  filter(technology == "microarray")

# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "GPL10558"
group_1_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(grepl("GPL10558", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- microarray_df %>% filter(!grepl("GPL10558", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- microarray_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "GPL10558", "other microarray platforms")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "GPL10558"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other microarray platforms"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df <- results_df %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "GPL6947 vs. other microarray platforms | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```

```{r platform microarray | one cell/tissue type vs. rest}
# List of platforms to iterate over
platforms <- c("CD34_blood", "DC_blood", "innateT_lung", "macro_blood", "mono_macro", "NTK_lung",
               "PB", "PBMC", "THP1_macro", "whole_blood")  

# Initialize an empty list to store the results for each platform
all_results <- list()

# Iterate over each platform
for (platform in platforms) {
  
  # Separate the group with signatures that partially match the current platform
  group_1_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(grepl(platform, cell_tissue_type)) %>% pull(cell_tissue_type)
  group_2_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(!grepl(platform, cell_tissue_type)) %>% pull(cell_tissue_type)
  
  # Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
  go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
    column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
    select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))
  
  # Build group vector for these two groups
  group_vec <- summary_df %>%
    filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
    distinct(cell_tissue_type) %>%
    mutate(group = ifelse(cell_tissue_type %in% group_1_sigs, platform, "other cell/tissue types")) %>%
    deframe()
  
  # Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
  results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
    # Separate values for the two groups
    group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == platform])])
    group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "other cell/tissue types"])])
  
    # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
    if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
      test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
      c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
    } else {
      c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
    }
  })
  
  # Convert results to a dataframe
  results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
  colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
  results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
  
  # Adjust p-values using BH correction
  results_df <- results_df %>%
    mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    arrange(p_adj)
  
  # Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
  results_df <- results_df %>%
    select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)
  
  # Get significant GO terms
  significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)
  
  # Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
  gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
    gt() %>%
    tab_header(
      title = paste(platform, "vs. other cell/tissue types | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test")
    ) %>%
    cols_label(
      GO_term = "GO Term",
      p_value = "Raw p-value",
      p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = "Enrichment Results",
      columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
    ) %>%
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
      ),
      locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
    )
  
  # Add the table to the list of results
  all_results[[platform]] <- gt_table
}

# no significant terms
```

```{r platform aggregated vs individual signatures}
# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "aggregated"
group_1_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(grepl("aggregated", signature)) %>% pull(signature)
group_2_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(!grepl("aggregated", signature)) %>% pull(signature)

# Filter the GO matrix to keep only the signatures in group 1 and group 2
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector for these two groups
group_vec <- summary_df %>%
  filter(signature %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(signature) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(signature %in% group_1_sigs, "aggregated signatures", "individual signatures")) %>%
  deframe()

# Perform Mann-Whitney test for each GO term using vectorized operations
results <- apply(go_mat_filtered, 1, function(values) {
  # Separate values for the two groups
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "aggregated signatures"])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == "individual signatures"])])

  # Check for at least one non-NA value in each group
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = FALSE)
    c(p_value = test$p.value, statistic = test$statistic)
  } else {
    c(p_value = NA, statistic = NA)
  }
})

# Convert results to a dataframe
results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))
colnames(results_df) <- c("p_value", "statistic")
results_df$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

# Adjust p-values using BH correction
results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  arrange(p_adj)

# Reorder the columns to place GO_term first
results_df <- results_df %>%
  select(GO_term, p_value, statistic, p_adj)

# Get significant GO terms
significant_go_terms <- results_df %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05)

# Convert significant GO terms to a gt table
gt_table <- significant_go_terms %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Aggregated vs. Individual Signatures | Significant GO Terms from The Mann-Whitney U Test"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Enrichment Results",
    columns = c("p_value", "p_adj")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "blue")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(columns = vars(p_value, p_adj))
  )

# Display the gt table
gt_table
```
